tagline: Trusted Pool Service and Repair in Palm Beach

trust_badges.badge_1: Licensed & Insured — FL State Pool Contractor

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves Andy's Personal Touch
hero.subheadline: Every service personally handled by owner Andy Brody — no random techs, no runaround. Palm Beach County's highest-rated pool company keeps your water crystal clear while you enjoy the Florida lifestyle.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Expert
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to full remodels, Andy personally handles or oversees every job. No subcontractors, no shortcuts — just honest, expert pool care for Palm Beach County homeowners.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Debris removal, water chemistry balancing, and filter maintenance starting at $125/month. Your pool stays swim-ready every week without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, and salt systems — Hayward, Pentair, Jandy, and more. Fast diagnosis and most repairs completed the same visit.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced detection methods pinpoint hidden leaks before they cause structural damage. Stop losing water and money with professional leak diagnosis.

cards.title: Pool Heater Services
cards.description: Expert heater repairs, seasonal tune-ups, and new installations so you can swim comfortably year-round in South Florida.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Resurfacing, new tile, coping, Diamond Brite, Pebble Tec, and full renovations. Transform your aging pool into a backyard showpiece.

cards.title: Pool Automation & Lighting
cards.description: Smart control systems and LED lighting upgrades for effortless pool management and stunning nighttime ambiance.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Text Andy Directly
steps.description: Reach the owner — not a call center. Describe your pool situation and get an honest assessment and free quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: Andy Handles It Personally
steps.description: Every service is performed or directly overseen by Andy. Licensed, insured, and equipped to work on any in-ground pool type in Palm Beach County.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Crystal clear water, equipment running smoothly, and zero stress. If anything is not right, Andy comes back and fixes it — no questions asked.

about.label: Why Palm Beach Trusts Andy
about.headline: Not a Franchise — Your Dedicated Pool Expert Since 2012
about.description: When Andy Brody founded Palm Beach Pool & Spa Service in 2012, he made a simple promise: every customer gets the owner's full attention. Fourteen years and 150+ five-star reviews later, that promise holds. Andy personally handles or oversees every single service call — from routine cleanings to complex equipment repairs across concrete, fiberglass, and vinyl liner pools throughout Palm Beach County.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Andy personally performs or supervises every service. You always know exactly who is caring for your pool.

features.title: Fair, Transparent Pricing
features.description: Honest quotes with no hidden fees. Weekly cleaning from $125/month — what Andy quotes is what you pay.

features.title: All Pool Types Welcome
features.description: Concrete, fiberglass, or vinyl liner — fully equipped to service and repair any in-ground pool in Palm Beach County.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Straightforward rates from a pool pro who believes in earning your trust every visit — not locking you into contracts.

guarantee.headline: Andy's Personal Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service, Andy will come back and make it right at no extra charge. No fine print, no runaround — just a local business owner who stakes his reputation on every single job.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are added to the schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent situations like a green pool or equipment failure, Andy offers same-day or next-day response. Just call or text directly.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and Andy takes care of everything while you are away. You will receive a summary after each visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: What types of pools do you service?
faqs.answer: All in-ground pool types — concrete, fiberglass, and vinyl liner. Andy is equipped and experienced with every major equipment brand including Hayward, Pentair, Jandy, Zodiac, and Raypak.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Palm Beach Pool & Spa Service holds a Florida State Pool Contractor License and carries full liability insurance. Every job is performed by or overseen by the licensed owner.

faqs.question: What does weekly pool cleaning include?
faqs.answer: Basic chlorine service starts at $125/month and includes skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and filter basket cleaning. Comprehensive service at $149.95/month adds brushing, tile cleaning, and full equipment checks.

testimonials.name: Jan D.
testimonials.text: He showed up, took complete ownership of the problem and got our pool looking good again in a short amount of time. Highly recommend Andy to anyone in the Palm Beach area.

testimonials.name: Rhicel P.
testimonials.text: Andy is the best! He is always on time, and communicates very well regarding any pool needs. My pool has never looked better since switching to his service.

testimonials.name: Erica B.
testimonials.text: Excellent work and quick to respond! Very happy with his work thus far and will continue to use him. Fair pricing and honest communication — exactly what you want.
